title: paepalanthus planifolius var. planifolius
intro: Paepalanthus planifolius var. planifolius is a plant species, also known as the flat-leaved Paepalanthus, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Paepalanthus planifolius var. planifolius include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be prepared by boiling its leaves and roots in water.
